title: ayenia subtilis
intro: Ayenia subtilis, also known as the small ayenia or ayenia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Malpighiaceae. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to be effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ayenia subtilis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from skin irritations and wounds. Ayenia subtilis is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used as a topical application to promote healing and soothe skin irritations.
